body:
Content
- Updated to Atmos 0.20.1 (included updating observations)
- Set Insolation to 0.9.0
- EKP config no longer takes a list of parameter names, they are grabbed automatically from the prior toml
- Improved test reproducibility with specific random seed
- Improved sphere HS observation map error handling
title: Update Atmos, simplify EKP config, other small fixes
